Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('src/presets.ts','utf8'\);const i=s.indexOf\('= [',s.indexOf\('export const PRESETS'\)\)+2;const t=s.slice\(i\);const P=eval\('\('+t.slice\(0,t.lastIndexOf\(']'\)+1\)+'\)'\);const all=P.flatMap\(g=>g.subgroups.flatMap\(sg=>sg.commands\)\);const find=l=>all.find\(c=>c.label===l\).command;console.log\('taint:',find\('노드 테인트\(Taint\) 확인'\)\);console.log\('sysctl:',find\('런타임 커널 변수'\)\);console.log\('mariadb:',find\('MariaDB 갤러라 상태'\)\);console.log\('find del:',find\('검색 후 일괄 삭제'\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('node-pty-prebuilt-multiarch' in \(p.dependencies||{}\) ? 'STILL LISTED' : 'removed from deps'\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\).dependencies||{}; const d=require\('./package.json'\).devDependencies||{}; console.log\('homebridge:', \('@homebridge/node-pty-prebuilt-multiarch' in p\)?'LISTED':'removed'\); console.log\('electron/rebuild:', \('@electron/rebuild' in d\)?'LISTED':'removed'\)")
